creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Thu Nov 14 20:09:00 2013
New Revision: 333786
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333786

Log:
  biology/seqtools: update to 4.23
  
  PR:		ports/183960
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/biology/seqtools/Makefile
  head/biology/seqtools/distinfo

Modified: head/biology/seqtools/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/biology/seqtools/Makefile	Thu Nov 14 19:38:40 2013	(r333785)
+++ head/biology/seqtools/Makefile	Thu Nov 14 20:09:00 2013	(r333786)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	seqtools
-PORTVERSION=	4.22
+PORTVERSION=	4.23
 CATEGORIES=	biology
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.sanger.ac.uk/pub4/resources/software/seqtools/PRODUCTION/
 
@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_GCC=	any
 USE_GNOME=	gtk20
 CFLAGS=		-I${LOCALBASE}/include
-LDFLAGS=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib -lexecinfo -lcurl
+LDFLAGS=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib -lexecinfo -lcurl -lm
 MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=	yes
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/biology/seqtools/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/biology/seqtools/distinfo	Thu Nov 14 19:38:40 2013	(r333785)
+++ head/biology/seqtools/distinfo	Thu Nov 14 20:09:00 2013	(r333786)

+SHA256 (seqtools-4.23.tar.gz) = 1ff07a646a0d7252ad2ec3e5095e5ee9dc2ea0a129830dbe87f6d3cdbff184aa
+SIZE (seqtools-4.23.tar.gz) = 7050014
